nation: Mississaugas of Scugog Island First Nation
economic_notes: Investments in Sonco Gaming UK Limited ($10,208,539), Sky Canoe Inc ($2,000,000). Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership revenue of $528,085. Commercial operations revenue of $12,743,852. COVID-19 noted as measurement uncertainty.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 4 subsidiaries: Noozhoo Nokiiyan GP Inc., Noozhoo Nokiiyan LP (NNLP), MSIFN (Island Road) Holdings Inc., and 2810351 Ontario Inc. Accumulated surplus includes $16,995,569 in remeasurement gains on portfolio investments. Prior year (2020) showed very large expenses of $128M and deficit of $87.2M, likely due to large land/asset acquisition. Future Generations fund held in BMO Harris portfolio ($53,160,094). Islands of the Trent Settlement fund in CIBC portfolio ($2,811,989). Restricted cash includes externally restricted CMHC housing fund ($97,614) and internally restricted funds ($13,750,731).
